Grubhub for Drivers

Driver Tasks

ROLE
Design Lead
SHIPPED
2023
OVERVIEW
Consolidated pick-up and drop-off into a unified task-card flow, reducing taps and enforcing photo and PIN verification. The new structure unlocked $6.63M in savings through delivery code verification and $4M through mandatory drop-off photos.
